title: Mellow Spicy German Sausage Skillet
description: A rich and shattering German dish featuring green chilli, perfect for a brunch mood, this keto-friendly recipe is slow-cooked to perfection. It combines the flavors of German sausage, green chilli, and spices for a delicious meal.
instructions: Heat the cooking oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the diced green chilli and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the German sausage to the skillet and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the chopped bell pepper to the skillet and cook until it is tender.
Stir in the paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the mixture for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
